title: Studio Zero Roadmap Bundle v1
description: Stable contract for the final delivered Build mode bundle (PRD §7.3 step 5). The bundle is the aggregate of every layer-lead's output, sealed at builds.state='delivered' and downloadable as a zip + browseable docs + (optionally) a seeded GitHub repo. The Jury audit gate (PRD §7.3 step 7) evaluates an instance of this shape and emits the audit_verdict that populates builds.delivered_verdict — a FAIL verdict refuses delivery (V2 audit-gate-blocks-delivery negative test; see architecture/database/migrations/0009_build_mode_v2.sql §D builds_delivered_verdict_required CHECK). Strict mode (additionalProperties: false) at every top-level component. The component names mirror the build_artifacts.artifact_type enum in 0009 §E so the bundle assembler can emit one artifact row per component plus the sealing full_bundle_zip row. Cross-refs: PRD §7.3 Build Workflow; sprint/milestone-V2.md Forge deliverables + Verify exit gate (ajv-validates a sample bundle); BIGBRAIN.md (PRD layer); SYSTEM_ACHITECTURE.md §3 layer dispatch.

schema_version.description: Pinned schema version. New shape = new version (v2, v3...). Never edited in place.

build_id.description: ULID of the builds row that produced this bundle. Crockford alphabet, 26 chars (mirrors builds.id CHECK in 0009 §D).

tenant_id.description: UUID of the owning tenant. The bundle is delivered to this tenant only; cross-tenant retrieval is denied by RLS on build_artifacts.

project_name.description: Display name from the confirmed BigBrain brief (brief.v1 project_name). Renders as the bundle title and the seeded GitHub repo name (slug-normalized).

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp the bundle was sealed by the bundle assembler. Distinct from builds.delivered_at (which is set when state transitions to 'delivered' after repo_seeding).

score_engine_version.description: Pinned score engine version that produced the verdict + score. Persisted to score_snapshots row alongside the integer score so re-audits across rubric-version boundaries can be compared via v1_equivalent_score backfill (mirrors audit-output.v1).

score.description: Deterministic readiness score per the PRD §10 formula evaluated against the audit gate's findings on the generated artifact. Integer 0..100 after rounding.

verdict.description: Jury audit gate verdict on the generated artifact (PRD §7.3 step 7). The bundle is delivered only when this is PASS or PASS WITH FIXES. A FAIL verdict refuses delivery (V2 exit-gate negative test) — builds.state lands on audit_gate_failed, not delivered. (The audit_verdict enum value persists to builds.delivered_verdict only on pass.)

roadmap.description: Sprint's milestone-format roadmap. Non-empty ordered list of milestones the customer ships against. Mirrors the sprint/milestone-MX.md format used internally so the customer can drop the rendered roadmap straight into their own Sprint workflow.

architecture.description: Axiom-produced architecture document. System diagram + component inventory + data model + decisions. Markdown body + structured component list for tooling.

prd.description: BigBrain-produced PRD for the customer's product. Goals, non-goals, user workflows, technical architecture summary. Markdown body + the structured fields tooling needs (goals[], non_goals[], success_criteria[] — echoed from the confirmed brief).

brand.description: Canvas + Pixel brand tokens. Colors, typography, spacing scale, voice cues. Tooling consumes the structured token list; the rendered preview is markdown.

voice.description: Herald brand-voice document. Tone, reading-level target, do/don't lists, sample copy for verdict surfaces + emails + landing copy.

decisions.description: Non-empty list of locked decisions Axiom + BigBrain made during the build. Each decision carries an ID, the question, the locked answer, the rationale, and any cross-references. Mirrors architecture/decisions.md ARCH-D<N> format.

risks.description: Sprint-format risk register. Each row: risk, likelihood, impact, mitigation owner, deadline.

cogs.description: Penny COGS analysis. Estimated unit economics for the product (LLM/cloud/storage costs at projected scale; pricing recommendations). Empty fields where Penny declines to estimate (honest gap).

channels.description: Signal go-to-market channels. Recommended acquisition channels with rationale + early-instrument plan (Hook integration). Empty array is permitted (internal-tooling risk_profile).

readme.description: README markdown the seeded repo ships with. Quick-start, prerequisites, structure overview, links to the other bundle components.

github_repo_url.description: Optional. The seeded GitHub repo URL when builds.output_preference IN ('roadmap_docs_seed','roadmap_docs_seed_scaffold'). Absent when output_preference='roadmap_docs' (markdown-only).

scaffold.description: Optional. V2.1 scaffold/MVP code reference. Present only when builds.output_preference='roadmap_docs_seed_scaffold' AND the Jury audit gate passed on the scaffold. Carries the path inside the seeded repo and a sha256 of the scaffold tree at delivery for tamper-evidence.

path.description: Path inside the seeded repo where the scaffold lives (e.g. 'apps/web').

tree_sha256.description: Lowercase hex sha256 of the canonicalized scaffold tree at delivery. Tamper witness; mismatches escalate to Crash + Shield.

id.description: Short milestone id (e.g. M0, M1, V2). Stable across re-emissions of the bundle.

exit_gate.description: Binary, automation-checkable exit gate (mirrors sprint/milestone-MX.md format).

estimated_weeks.description: Optional. Estimated calendar weeks to complete.

deliverables.description: Optional. Per-layer deliverable list (one entry per assigned layer-lead).

body_markdown.description: Markdown body — system diagram (mermaid ok), component overview, data model summary.

success_criteria.description: Echoed from the confirmed brief (BigBrain may refine; the Jury audit gate compares against this set).

reading_level_max.description: Highest grade level any user-facing copy should hit (Herald default = 9).

estimated_unit_cost_micros.description: Optional. Penny's projected per-unit cost in micros ($/1e6) at the modeled scale. Absent when Penny declines to estimate (honest gap).

recommended_price_micros.description: Optional. Recommended customer-facing price in micros. Absent for internal-tooling risk_profile.
